name: Lentil Soup with Cilantro
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and remove any damaged lentils.
2. In a soup pot, combine the lentils, onion, garlic, bay leaf, and water.
3. Bring to a boil over high heat.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 40 minutes.
5. Add salt toward the end of the cooking time.
6. Remove from the heat.
7. Discard the onion and bay leaf.
8. Puree half of the soup in a blender or through a food mill.
9. Heat through, add salt and pepper to taste.
10. Stir in the chopped cilantro.
11. Serve with a dollop of yogurt on top.
Nutritional info: 177 calories; 5G protein; .75G fat; 30G carbohydrate; 17MG sodium; 0 cholesterol.
